title: Vector Store Management Flow
interaction_flow: Client → Stores::create(name, description, fileIds, expiresWhenIdleFor, provider)
alt faked: AiManager → clone provider + useStoreGateway(fakeStoreGateway())
Stores → Ai::fakeableStoreProvider(provider) → AiManager (same resolution as above)
alt file is StorableFile: Store → Store::storeFile(file)
Files::put → FileProvider: uploads file, returns HasProviderId
alt Ai::storesAreFaked(): Store → Ai::recordFileAddition(storeId, fileId, originalFile)
alt deleteFile && removed: Store → Files::delete(documentId->id(), provider=provider->name())
StoreProvider → Store: returns new Store instance
key_relationships: Stores depends_on Ai (facade) for provider resolution
AiManager::fakeableStoreProvider() wraps real provider with FakeStoreGateway when faked
Store depends_on Files static facade for file upload/delete
Store depends_on Ai static facade for fake recording
StoreProvider interface: getStore(), createStore(), deleteStore(), addFileToStore(), removeFileFromStore(), useStoreGateway()
FileProvider interface: provides file upload via Files::put()

key_classes.Stores: Static facade. Methods: get(storeId,provider):Store, create(name,description,fileIds,expiresWhenIdleFor,provider):Store, delete(storeId,provider):bool, fake(responses,files):FakeStoreGateway
key_classes.Store: Instance. Constructor(FileProvider&StoreProvider $provider, string $id, ?string $name, StoreFileCounts $fileCounts, bool $ready). Methods: add(file,metadata):AddedDocumentResponse, remove(documentId,deleteFile):bool, refresh():self, delete():bool
key_classes.AiManager: Extends MultipleInstanceManager. Uses traits: InteractsWithFakeStores, InteractsWithFakeFiles, etc. Methods: storeProvider(?name):StoreProvider, fakeableStoreProvider(?name):StoreProvider
key_classes.StoreProvider: Contract/interface. Methods: createStore(), getStore(), deleteStore(), addFileToStore(), removeFileFromStore(), useStoreGateway()
key_classes.AddedDocumentResponse: Wraps provider response + optional fileId string

important_notes: Store::add() handles three file types: UploadedFile (converted to Base64Document), StorableFile (uploaded via Files::put() first), or HasProviderId/string (used directly). AiManager resolves providers by driver key from config ai.providers.<name>. Fake mode swaps the gateway on a cloned provider instance, not the provider itself.
